results.file: A colossal ice dragon perched atop a jagged, snow-covered mountain peak, breathing a brilliant stream of blue fire into a dark winter sky. Shimmering frost textures, dramatic cinematic lighting, epic fantasy scale. 1080p.png
results.original: A colossal ice dragon perched atop a jagged, snow-covered mountain peak, breathing a brilliant stream of blue fire into a dark winter sky. Shimmering frost textures, dramatic cinematic lighting, epic fantasy scale.
results.reconstructed: Epic fantasy digital concept art of a large ice-blue dragon perched on a jagged, snow-covered mountain peak at night, wings spread wide, breathing a powerful stream of bright cyan-blue fire toward the upper right sky, cinematic wide-angle low-angle shot emphasizing monumental scale, diagonal composition with the flame leading the eye to the top right corner, a pale moon partially glowing behind the left wing, layered snowy mountain ranges receding into a dark starry horizon, deep sharp focus on the dragon and foreground rock with atmospheric haze softening the distant peaks, intense glow and bloom radiating from the blue flame casting cool rim light on the dragon's scales and neck, cold high-contrast blue and navy color grading with crushed black shadows, hyper-detailed CGI/digital painting hybrid rendering of dragon scales, ice, and snow textures, no text, moody arctic atmosphere, 16:9 widescreen cinematic key art.

subject_action.value: A large ice-blue dragon perched on a jagged, snow-covered mountain peak, wings spread wide, breathing a powerful stream of bright blue fire/energy toward the upper-right sky.
subject_action.agreement: All three reports agree on subject, pose, and action.

composition.value: Wide cinematic landscape composition with the dragon positioned left-of-center to center-left, wings spread filling the mid-to-left frame; a partially obscured moon sits behind the left wing; the flame breath creates a strong diagonal pulling the eye toward the upper-right corner; foreground mountain peak anchors the bottom of the frame with layered snowy mountain ranges receding into a dark starry sky.
composition.agreement: Strong consensus across all three reports on placement, diagonal flow, and background layering.

camera_language.value: Wide-angle lens, low-to-eye-level angle looking up at the dragon to emphasize monumental scale; cinematic key-art/poster-style framing with a strong diagonal visual flow from wings and flame.
camera_language.agreement: All three reports independently describe a wide-angle, low/eye-level heroic framing.

focus_lens_effects.value: Deep, largely sharp focus across the dragon, foreground rocks, and distant mountains, with atmospheric softening/perspective haze in the background rather than true lens bokeh; the blue flame exhibits pronounced glow, bloom, and rim-light effects; no chromatic aberration or shallow depth of field noted.
focus_lens_effects.agreement: Consistent across all reports on deep focus plus glow/bloom from the flame.

lighting_color_grading.value: Cold, heavily blue/cyan nocturnal color grade; the intense blue fire acts as the dominant light source, casting rim light and glow onto the dragon's head, neck, and scales, with secondary cool moonlight backlighting through the wing; high contrast with deep navy/crushed-black shadows in sky and clouds.
lighting_color_grading.agreement: Very strong agreement across all three reports on cold blue palette and fire as key light source.

style_medium.value: Highly detailed digital fantasy concept art / cinematic CGI render, blending semi-photorealistic dragon anatomy and scale texture with painterly atmospheric mountains and magical fire effects.
style_medium.agreement: General agreement on digital fantasy CGI/illustration hybrid; minor variation between 'photorealistic 3D render' and 'painterly digital illustration' phrasing noted.

text_in_image.value: No readable text or alphanumeric characters visible; one report notes a faint, non-alphanumeric geometric mark in the lower-right background that may be a partially cropped watermark or artifact.
text_in_image.agreement: Two reports find no text at all; one adds an unconfirmed geometric mark — treated as supplementary detail rather than contradiction.

reference_image_echoes.value: Strong thematic echo of the 'ice dragon' archetype (e.g., Viserion from Game of Thrones) — a pale dragon breathing blue flame over a frozen mountainous landscape.
reference_image_echoes.agreement: Disagreement: two reports found no specific recognizable reference, while one identified a strong thematic pop-culture echo; the more visually specific claim was retained with reduced confidence.

negative_space_exclusions.value: The scene excludes warm fire tones (no orange/red), maintaining a strictly cold arctic blue/white/navy palette throughout, including background and negative space.
negative_space_exclusions.agreement: Only one report offered a specific signal; field confidence capped per methodology regardless of support.

artifact_fingerprint.value: Consistent evidence across reports points toward diffusion-family generation (Flux/Midjourney-class model): soft/melted wing-to-sky transitions, minor structural ambiguity at wing-shoulder joints, slightly uniform glow patterning in the flame, and a possible small geometric watermark-like artifact in the lower right; none of the reports argue for native-multimodal generation.
artifact_fingerprint.agreement: All three reports converge on diffusion-family origin, reinforced by Stage 0 pixel-grid match to Flux dev-grid; no family-level contest present.

provenance.value: Likely AI-generated fantasy illustration; C2PA/content-credential manifest bytes detected (sniffed, not cryptographically verified) and pixel grid consistent with Flux-family diffusion output, aligning with all three reports' independent assessment of AI generation.

results.reconstructed: Photorealistic 3D-rendered cinematic concept art of a futuristic jet-powered racing car with a dark carbon-fiber body and glowing blue neon accent lines, speeding low through a rugged, muddy canyon riverbed, kicking up a massive spray of muddy water and dust to its side, twin rear rocket-thruster pods blasting bright orange-yellow flame alongside blue-glowing jet exhaust, car marked with '07' on the hood, '#07' on the side, 'ORBITAL RAGING' on the rear wing, and 'BLAZE-X' on the side panel, shot from a low-angle wide-angle tracking camera close to the ground to convey high speed with motion blur streaking across the canyon walls and rocky debris, dramatic golden-hour sunset lighting with saturated orange-amber tones contrasted by cool cyan-blue vehicle lighting, high dynamic range with glowing highlights on dust and flame, deep shadowed canyon walls framing both sides of the frame, sharp focus on the vehicle with cinematic bloom and glow, rugged natural terrain with no paved track, widescreen 16:9 automotive/video-game key art aesthetic.

composition.agreement: moderate (3/3 agree on canyon-framing and sunset vanishing point; minor disagreement on exact car placement — left-of-center vs lower-right foreground)

camera_language.value: Low-angle, near-ground tracking/chase-camera perspective using a wide-angle lens to capture both vehicle and canyon walls, with motion-oriented framing implying high speed.

focus_lens_effects.value: Sharp focus on the vehicle with motion blur on canyon walls, rocks, and debris; bloom/glow highlights on exhaust flames and dust spray; mild depth-of-field softening in the background; overall hyper-clarity CGI-style rendering rather than true optical falloff.
focus_lens_effects.agreement: strong (3/3 agree on sharp vehicle focus plus motion blur/glow effects)

lighting_color_grading.value: Dramatic golden-hour/sunset backlighting with saturated orange-amber tones and deep shadowed canyon rock, contrasted by cool cyan-blue vehicle lighting and exhaust accents; high dynamic range with glowing highlights.

style_medium.value: Photorealistic digital 3D-rendered concept art / cinematic key art, typical of automotive or futuristic racing-game promotional visualization.

text_in_image.value: '07' on the hood, '#07' on the side, 'BLAZE-X' on the side panel/rear wing, and a rear-wing/side-pod label read as 'ORBITAL RAGING' by two reports and 'ORBITAL RACING' by one; additional small text blocks near the side number are garbled/illegible across all reports.

reference_image_echoes.value: No recognizable real-world vehicle, person, or branded model; design reads as an original fictional concept, though it evokes the visual language of futuristic racing-game franchises (e.g., Wipeout, Trackmania, Ridge Racer).

negative_space_exclusions.value: Scene notably excludes clean asphalt or standard modern racetrack elements — the environment is strictly natural, rugged, and muddy rather than a conventional racing surface.

artifact_fingerprint.value: Diffusion-family generative tells present across all reports: largely coherent vehicle geometry and mostly-legible primary logos, but with minor garbling on small secondary text, soft/melting edges on dust and flame plumes, and a small sparkle/diamond-shaped mark near the lower-right corner resembling a generative-platform watermark. Consistent with a high-fidelity diffusion model (e.g., FLUX/Midjourney-class).

provenance.value: Likely diffusion-based AI-generated image. C2PA/content-credentials manifest bytes were sniffed (not cryptographically verified), and the pixel grid matches a Flux-style dev-grid (÷32) spacing consistent with modern diffusion output; a small watermark-like icon near the lower-right corner further supports an AI-generation platform origin.

camera_language.value: Street-level to slightly elevated vantage point, likely wide-to-moderate field of view, deep perspective down the urban canyon, documentary night-photography feel.

focus_lens_effects.value: Deep, broad depth of field with most planes reasonably sharp; fine vertical rain streaks rendered clearly; wet-pavement reflections and slight atmospheric/distance softness on far figures and signage.
focus_lens_effects.agreement: All three reports agree on deep focus, rain-streak rendering, and wet reflections; minor variance on bokeh vs. full sharpness.

lighting_color_grading.value: High-contrast night scene with saturated neon signage (reds, pinks, blues, cyans, greens) reflecting across wet asphalt; cool overall tone offset by warm street lighting, cinematic neon-noir grade.
lighting_color_grading.agreement: Strong agreement across all three reports.

style_medium.value: Photorealistic digital image simulating a high-resolution night photograph of a Shibuya-style Japanese street scene, likely AI-generated or heavily digitally enhanced rather than a straight photograph.

text_in_image.value: 渋谷 / SHIBUYA, 東京ゲーム, ラーメン, NEO TOKYO, 24時間, UC, plus additional smaller/partially legible Japanese signage text, some showing minor garbling on peripheral signs.

reference_image_echoes.value: Strongly evokes the well-known Shibuya Crossing aesthetic (Tokyo), including anime-style billboard figures used as in-scene signage rather than identifiable reference-image echoes of a real person or character.
reference_image_echoes.agreement: All three reports converge on this reading.

negative_space_exclusions.value: No visible open sky or negative space; frame is entirely filled with dense architecture, signage, rain, and crowd.
negative_space_exclusions.agreement: Only one report offered a positive signal (no open sky/dense framing); other two reported no strong signal, treated as non-votes. Capped per schema rule.

artifact_fingerprint.value: Contested: readings diverge between diffusion-family generation (small-text garbling, soft/melted sign borders, ambiguous limb blending on overlapping figures) and native-multimodal generation (exceptionally clear, correctly-stroked Japanese text on major signage such as "渋谷", with only minor garbling on peripheral signs). Overall composition is highly coherent multi-subject scene regardless of family.

provenance.value: C2PA/content-credentials manifest bytes detected (sniff-level, not cryptographically verified); pixel grid matches Flux/diffusion dev-grid pattern (768×1376), raising prior toward diffusion-family origin, but model-level stylistic impressions remain heuristic.
